---
title: "Alexander James Beresford Beresford Hope"
---

## Alexander James Beresford Beresford Hope

**Dates:** (1820-1887)

### Description

landowner and architectural writer

### Biography

He married (1842) Lady Mildred Cecil.

### Letters

- Letter from March 14. 1849

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
